title: Use a Template with Permissions
excerpt:

posts.author: YossiKarp (Yossi Karp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I notice that when I use a custom template on which I have set View restrictions for certain columns, those restrictions are not carried through to the new Board. I don’t want to have to set the column permissions each time. How do I automate this?

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: straister (Shelly Traister)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get support on this @YossiKarp?

posts.author: YossiKarp (Yossi Karp)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, I never received an answer. But it’s not really relevant anymore.

Thanks for asking, though.
